rationale: Elec. Code §146.031 governs preparation and distribution of write-in candidate lists for ballots. It is wholly unrelated to Tax Code §11.13(b) homestead exemption amounts. No conflict exists.
quote: The authority responsible for having the official ballot prepared shall prepare a list containing the name of each write-in candidate certified to the authority.
_note: No relationship between election ballot write-in procedures and property tax homestead exemption amounts.
